docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BERNAVAGE, MICHAEL DEFENDANT'S CLAIM DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THIS CLAIM HEARD AND DECIDED IN A PREVIOUS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
